remarks: Stamford 818SF condo Available September 1, 2026 with two bedrooms asking $2,900.00. per month which includes heat, hot water, electricity. Conveniently located just minutes from downtown Stamford, on the eighth floor with good views of Stamford. This location places you within easy access to all downtown Stamford has to offer including wonderful restaurants, houses of worship, shopping, library, train, theaters and Mill River Park.  A short drive will take you to all Stamford beaches.  This property vinyl hardwood floors and the kitchen & bathroom have been updated. Two entrances. Also the premises has just been painted.  Included in the rent is a 24 hour doorman, exercise room, sauna, laundry room, two parking spaces , one of which is assigned in garage.
